  "findings": [
    "Weep holes are missing or blocked at the bottom course of the masonry wall."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clear blocked weep holes and drill or install new weep holes at the bottom course to ensure proper drainage before closing out the work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Weep holes are required immediately above the flashing to allow accumulated moisture to drain out of the cavity. Missing or blocked weep holes violate TMS 402 and BIA Technical Notes, posing a high risk of water damage, efflorescence, and freeze-thaw spalling.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 402 Section 6.1.6",
    "BIA Technical Note 7"
  ]
}
